description: Configure the assessment and scoring system for the 'Perceived Stress Scale (PSS-10) - Student Well-Being Study' survey. Enable assessments mode and update the scoring for questions PSS04, PSS05, PSS07, and PSS08 to reverse scoring (Never=4, Almost Never=3, Sometimes=2, Fairly Often=1, Very Often=0). Establish three assessment rules: Low Stress (0-13, message 'Low perceived stress'), Moderate Stress (14-26, message 'Moderate perceived stress'), and High Stress (27-40, message 'High perceived stress'). Activate the survey when configuration is complete. Login credentials: admin / Admin123!
